name: Dinkum Chili
recipeIngredient: 26 1/2 g Mount Isa Dark Red Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add Wallaroo Bacon and cook until crispy, then remove with a slotted spoon.
3. In the same pot, sauté chopped onions (white and brown) until translucent.
4. Add Ground Emu Ham and cook for 2-3 minutes.
5. Stir in diced green pepper, celery stalks, and minced garlic.
6. Add chopped Red Kangaroo Shank and cooked Gray Kangaroo Steak to the pot.
7. Mix in the chilies (Tasmanian Light Red Chili, Wooroorooks Chili, Mount Isa Dark Chili) and season with oregano, cumin, and brown sugar.
8. Pour in the Australian Beer and stir gently.
9. Add chopped tomatoes and bring the mixture to a simmer.
10. Reduce heat to low and let it simmer for 1-2 hours until flavors are well combined.
11. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
12. Serve hot and enjoy.
